alien_graveyard_match.fallback: If the preflight sees a missing non-env input or any dependency other than the previous output, return to the existing producer/consumer dependency-count scheduler.

change.lever: Detect already-topological single-output pure chains before constructing producer/consumer maps, then evaluate them in equation order using the same single-output evaluator.

isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes; accepted chains have no competing ready equations, and rejected DAGs retain existing index-sorted ready-wave execution.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: identical; primitive evaluation function and equation order are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A; CPU scheduler path has no RNG inputs or seeds.
